lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The interior and exterior show minor signs of wear from normal use. All mechanical systems are fully operational and have been regularly maintained.

Get ready to be impressed by this absolute showstopper! This vehicle is in truly mint condition, looking and feeling just as pristine as the day it first left the showroom. It has been meticulously cared for and maintained to the highest standard, offering a flawless driving experience and a spotless interior. If you're looking for a top-tier car that is practically brand new, this is the perfect find for you!
The vehicle is in fair condition. It shows visible wear on both the interior and exterior. Some mechanical systems require maintenance or repairs, though the vehicle remains operational.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained by its previous owners. The exterior paint is in nice shape with only minor cosmetic imperfections like small stone chips and light surface scratches consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean, comfortable, and free of any major wear or odors. Mechanically, the car is solid; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts well, and all electronic features are fully functional. It is a reliable choice that is ready for the road.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just left the showroom. The exterior paint is flawless, maintaining a deep, factory-original shine with no chips, scratches, or dings. Inside, the interior is immaculate; the upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every feature, from the infotainment system to the climate control, operates perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, supported by a comprehensive service history and meticulous upkeep. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been preserved in pristine state, offering total peace of mind for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been subjected to a rigorous professional inspection, confirming its operational reliability and structural soundness. With a refined interior and a clean, preserved exterior, it stands as a testament to diligent ownership and consistent care. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver who demands a high-caliber driving experience and long-term value.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride and it's looking for a great new home. It’s been well-loved and is in really solid shape, perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways! It runs like a dream and has plenty of life left in it. I've taken great care of it, and I'm sure you'll love how it handles on the road. Drop me a message if you're interested—I'd love to show it to you!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure VANOS variable valve timing system for linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Power is sent through a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains composed with a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings. Recent preventative maintenance includes a valve clearance adjustment and rod bearing service. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical synchronization and throttle response remain exceptionally sharp.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Minor cosmetic wear. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, showing only minor, expected signs of road use, while the alloy wheels remain in excellent shape. Inside, the smoke-free cabin is remarkably clean; the seats show minimal wear, and every button, dial, and screen functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in strong health, having received regular oil changes and preventative maintenance, resulting in a smooth, quiet ride with responsive handling. It is a dependable, attractive, and well-cared-for example that is ready for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic profile, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and long-term reliability. Fully inspected to ensure operational excellence, this motorcar stands as a testament to quality craftsmanship and responsible ownership, ready for immediate delivery.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent care and mechanical reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for safety and performance. Featuring a well-preserved exterior and a refined interior, this vehicle offers an exceptional balance of sophistication and long-term value for the discerning driver.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my trusty ride. It’s been super reliable and still drives like a dream! It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of great miles left in it. It’s the perfect blend of comfort and value—I've honestly loved every trip in it. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This meticulously maintained SUV offers a perfect balance of reliability and luxury. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, though minor stone chips consistent with highway driving are present upon close inspection. Inside, the premium leather seats are supple with only light creasing on the driver’s bolster, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the navigation system—functions flawlessly. It has been garage-kept and serviced strictly at the dealership every 5,000 miles. With a smooth-shifting transmission and responsive handling, this vehicle provides a premium driving experience. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and new brake pads, making it ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

This vehicle strikes a fine balance between performance and daily utility, presenting in a state that reflects attentive ownership. The exterior retains a vibrant, high-gloss finish, showing only the minor, expected road-wear consistent with light use. Step inside to find a smoke-free cabin where the premium upholstery remains firm and free of punctures or significant wear. All onboard technology, including the navigation system and premium audio, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is robust; it has a documented history of on-time servicing, including a recent fluid flush and brake inspection. The engine pulls cleanly, and the suspension remains tight and responsive. Included are all original manuals, two sets of fobs, and a comprehensive folder of maintenance receipts. This is a dependable, well-maintained example that offers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333 hp with an 8,000 RPM redline. Equipped with a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, the drivetrain is optimized for high-revving performance. The double-VANOS system has been recently serviced, and the rear subframe—a critical point for this chassis—has been professionally reinforced. Suspension geometry remains precise thanks to upgraded polyurethane bushings and Bilstein B8 dampers. It sits on staggered 19-inch Style 67 wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber.
